title: Campsisnca JSON Schema

stratification_variables.description: Stratification variable names present in the simulation output. Strata names are automatically identified from the simulation output.

analyses.description: List of NCA analyses. For example, one analysis may focus on NCA metrics for day 1, and another on those for day 7.

name.description: Name of this analysis. This name will appear in the table. All names must be unique.

default_start_time.description: Default start time for this analysis. Can be overridden if needed in the metric itself. If undefined, default start time is 0.

default_end_time.description: Default end time for this analysis. Can be overridden if needed in the metric itself. If undefined, default end time is the last time in the simulation output.

analysis.description: Definition of a period or a group.

name.description: Name of the metric. This name can include grouping variables. E.g. '<METRIC> <PERIOD>'

unit.description: Informative unit string for this metric.

output_variable.description: Output variable on which the metric must be computed.

custom_start_time.description: Custom start time. This will override the 'default_start_time' property of the analysis.

custom_end_time.description: Custom end time. This will override the 'default_end_time' property of the analysis.

method.description: Method used to compute AUC. If undefined, 'linlin' will be used as the default method.
